subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory, My loving-kindness and My grace, which hath preceded existence, and My mercy which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی و عنایتی و فضلی الذی سبق الوجود و رحمتی التی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @unity; oneness of humanity, @high station of the true believer, @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
